title: tephrosia virginiana var. mohrii
intro: Tephrosia virginiana var. mohrii, also known as Yellow Pea or Wild Bean, is a perennial legume plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a demulcent and anti-inflammatory agent, to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia virginiana var. mohrii include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
